instructions.instruction: Use this skill when the task is to change structure without changing intended behavior.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill when the task is to change structure without changing intended behavior.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger refactor-code.

instructions.instruction: Prefer adapters, facades, or wrappers for transitional states.
instructions.original_snippets: Prefer adapters, facades, or wrappers for transitional states.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger refactor-code.

instructions.instruction: **EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT:** Run verification after every refactoring step.
instructions.original_snippets: **EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT:** Run verification after every refactoring step.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger refactor-code.

instructions.instruction: **Write this before touching any production file.** This is not optional — no refactoring step begins until this test exists and passes on the current (un-refactored) code.
instructions.original_snippets: **Write this before touching any production file.** This is not optional — no refactoring step begins until this test exists and passes on the current (un-refactored) code.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger refactor-code.

instructions.instruction: Run it: `bundle exec rspec spec/requests/orders_spec.rb` — it must pass on the **current** code before any refactoring begins. If it fails, stop and fix the test or the existing code first.
